capabilities.description: Score every inbound payment transaction against a risk model at submission time, returning a pass/review/block decision within 200ms. PayHub's existing batch fraud engine provides historical data for model training.
Automatically match and reconcile transactions across web, mobile, and partner API channels without manual intervention. Integrates with PayHub's settlement ledger.
Expose a unified API for customers and operations to query live transaction status, reducing inbound support calls related to payment uncertainty.
Transform outgoing settlement messages to ISO 20022 XML format for regulatory compliance, leveraging PayHub's existing message bus infrastructure.
Structured workflow for logging, routing, and resolving payment disputes with SLA tracking. Reduces reliance on manual email-based resolution.
Real-time visibility dashboard for the operations team showing transaction volumes, reconciliation status, fraud flags, and SLA compliance.

open_questions.question: Does the existing PayHub platform expose APIs for real-time ledger writes, or does it require batch file uploads?
open_questions.why: Determines whether real-time reconciliation is technically feasible without PayHub changes
open_questions.example: e.g. 'PayHub exposes a REST API for real-time ledger writes (POST /ledger/entries); batch file upload is only used for end-of-day settlement runs'
